title: helianthus annuus var. californicus
intro: Helianthus annuus var. californicus, also known as California sunflower, is a variety of the common sunflower plant native to western North America. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Helianthus annuus var. californicus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
